_note: Generic history-taking domains used by the open-book live checklist, the 'I'm stuck' hint button, and the guided-script fallback. Keywords are lowercase substrings matched against the STUDENT's transcript turns — keep them short, high-precision phrases a student would actually say. No API calls involved.

domains.label: Open the consultation
keywords: what can i do for you
questions: What brings you in today?
How can I help you today?

domains.label: Onset & duration
questions: When did it start?
How long have you had this?

domains.label: Location / site
questions: Where exactly do you feel it?
Can you point to where it is?

domains.label: Character / quality
questions: Can you describe what it feels like?
What kind of pain is it — sharp, dull, burning?

domains.label: Severity (1–10)
questions: On a scale of one to ten, how bad is it?
How much does it affect your daily life?

domains.label: Aggravating / relieving factors
questions: Does anything make it better or worse?
Have you noticed anything that triggers it?

domains.label: Timing & progression
questions: Has it changed since it started?
Does it come and go, or is it there all the time?

domains.label: Associated symptoms
questions: Have you noticed any other symptoms along with it?
Is there anything else that's been bothering you?

domains.label: Past medical history
questions: Do you have any medical conditions I should know about?
Have you ever been diagnosed with anything in the past?

domains.label: Medications
questions: Are you taking any medications at the moment?
Do you take any tablets or medicines regularly?

domains.label: Allergies
questions: Do you have any allergies, especially to medicines?

domains.label: Social history
questions: Do you smoke, or drink alcohol?
Who do you live with at home?

domains.label: Patient's ideas (I)
questions: Do you have any thoughts about what might be causing this?

domains.label: Patient's concerns (C)
questions: Is there anything in particular you're worried about?

domains.label: Patient's expectations (E)
questions: What were you hoping we could do for you today?

domains.label: Summarize & close
questions: Let me summarize what we've discussed to make sure I've got it right.
Before we finish — is there anything else you'd like to mention?
